name: preuser
description: Set up and triage preuser PR checks on a repo. The bundled Codex skill writes .preuser/config.yml for sandbox bring-up, static staging URLs, or post-deploy GitHub Deployment URLs; checks connector status; validates config shape; seals login values; rescues setup/run failures; and can send consented setup pain reports.

interface.shortDescription: Set up human-like PR journey checks
interface.longDescription: Configure preuser from inside a repo. The skill helps Codex inspect how the app runs, choose sandbox or deployed preview targets, write gradeable journeys, seal credentials safely, validate config shape, triage failed runs, and send consented setup feedback to preuser.
defaultPrompt: Use $preuser to set up preuser PR checks for this repo.
Use $preuser to validate this repo's preuser config.
Use $preuser to rescue a preuser run that errored.
